title: IDF crosses Litani River near Zawtar al-Sharqiyah — CBC on Netanyahu confirmation
snippet: CBC News reports on IDF crossing the Litani River near Zawtar al-Sharqiyah, with Netanyahu's personal confirmation of the 36th Division crossing. Updates and confirms the unconfirmed clashes reported in previous sources.
tag_reason: Update on yesterday's src-1460 Litani clashes — CBC now confirms full crossing with Netanyahu statement and location detail
